findings.evidence_span: config.yaml contains audit_log_retention_days without a usable retention policy
findings.recommended_fix: Log upload/download/delete events with actor, object, action, result, timestamp, and retention.

findings.evidence_span: app.py stores user-controlled filenames under /public/uploads or UPLOAD_ROOT
findings.recommended_fix: Generate server-side filenames and store uploads outside public executable roots.

findings.evidence_span: app.py uses filename.endswith(...) without MIME or magic-byte validation
findings.recommended_fix: Validate MIME type, magic bytes, extension, and file size together before accepting uploads.
